name: Frozen Chocolate Bananas
recipeIngredient: Milk chocolate pieces or semi-sweet chocolate pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop peanuts in a bowl.
2. Place a piece of waxed paper on a plate.
3. Melt the chocolate, stirring until it melts completely. Remove from heat.
4. Peel bananas and cut them in half.
5. Push a wooden stick into the end of each banana half (popsicle sticks will work).
